title.en: After a long time, these primitive antiquities ...

content.en:
Bang!!!

Ye Tian shot again and again, killing a half-step sevenfold ancestor-level primordial artifact, although he didn't go all out and hid part of his strength, the strength he could show was still very terrifying.

A primordial artifact died in his hands, and some of the treasures left behind after the death of the primordial artifact were also collected by him.

Time passed slowly, and as a large number of primordial artifacts were killed, the burden on the Star Ancient Giant City formation was also greatly reduced.

After a long time, these primitive antiquities disappeared one by one.

At this time, the Star Ancient Giant City lifted the formation and returned to its normal state.

And Dao Ancestor, who was in the Star Ancient Giant City, also breathed a sigh of relief, after all, they were also worried that the Star Ancient Giant City would be breached!

Many Dao Ancestors have invaded most of their financial resources in the Star Ancient Giant City, and even settled permanently, if this place is breached, even if they escape with their lives, the losses will be extremely heavy!

......

"This harvest is not small, but the number of primordial antiquities that appear this time is really too much, if so many primordial antiquities appear on the side of the primeval primordial region, no one can withstand it!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Until now, practitioners have not been able to understand the secrets of the primordial antiquities and the principles of the primordial antiquities.

But one thing is certain, and that is not to try to provoke the original antiquities.

Even if the Yae Origin Ancestor dared to stay in the Silent Black Sea all the time, one day he would encounter an Primordial Artifact that he could not provoke and fall.

Like the Star Ancient Giant City, it just uses a special way to imitate the district boundary, and the district boundary can exist permanently in the Silent Black Sea, and the same is true for the Star Ancient Giant City.

"It's a pity that I don't dare to copy the body of the original antiquity!"

Ye Tian smiled bitterly and shook his head.

Every time he tried to copy the body of the original antiquity, he would feel a great horror, so from the beginning to the present, he did not copy the original antiquity.

It was as if even if he really dared to copy it, he would be targeted by an incomparably terrifying existence, which would lead to his own exposure.

Therefore, he never dared to take risks.

Otherwise, he disguised himself as a primordial antiquity and entered the ancient nests of primordial antiquities, and then he could get whatever treasures he wanted.

Unfortunately, this kind of thing can't be done.

......

Xinggu Giant City, the City Lord's Mansion.

The high-level leaders of the big forces gathered here, and every Dao Ancestor who came was the peak realm of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor.

The Pavilion Master of the Xuanyu Pavilion Branch, the peak powerhouse of the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor, the Xuanhuang Dao Ancestor!

Elder of the Sword Feather Sect, the peak powerhouse of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, and the Dao Ancestor of Chenshan!

Elder of Hanhai Palace, sevenfold peak powerhouse, round stone Dao ancestor!

Vice President of the Xinggu Chamber of Commerce, and the City Lord of the Xinggu Giant City, a sevenfold peak powerhouse, and a Heiya Dao Ancestor!

......

These Dao Ancestors at the peak level of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestors gathered here, and they were all discussing a big matter.

At this time, as the city lord of the Star Ancient Giant City, he spoke.

"You are all the ancestors of the Sevenfold Peak who have been stationed in the Star Ancient Giant City for a long time, and you are also the high-level or leaders of the major forces, and I have called you here this time to discuss the opening of the 13th Ancient Lair. This time, we attracted countless primordial artifacts, took the opportunity to kill countless primordial artifacts, and used the great array to absorb the origin of the primordial antiquities, and in this special period, the barrier of the No. 13 ancient nest was in the weakest state, enough to open the No. 13 ancient nest! However, the number of primordial artifacts that could be absorbed was limited, so the number of places was limited. We can't continue to attract countless primordial artifacts, or we will cause great terror. Therefore, only these places can be set. "

After Heiya Dao Ancestor finished speaking, the other Dao Ancestors expressed their opinions one by one.

"I want 50,000 places in Hanhai Palace, which is not much, right?"

The cobblestone Dao Ancestor of Hanhai Palace demanded.

"Fifty thousand places?" Heiya Dao Ancestor frowned, "Yuanshi Dao Ancestor, last time you Hanhai Palace asked for forty-eight thousand places, and the origin of the primordial antiquities that you absorbed this time is much less than the origin you absorbed last time, how can you increase the number of places?"

The Round Stone Dao Ancestor sneered: "The Sword Feather Sect and the Xuanyu Pavilion suffered heavy losses in the last Black Silence Dao Ancestor incident, and many Sevenfold Origin Ancestors were lost, and one of the Sevenfold Peak Ancestors was killed, and their strength was greatly reduced, and in the end, it was our Hanhai Palace that solved the trouble and paid a great price." So, what's wrong with increasing the number of places this time?"

When the two Dao Ancestors of Xuanyu Pavilion and Sword Feather Sect heard this, their faces were very ugly.

But they couldn't refute it, and the Hanhai Palace was the most powerful force in the Hanhai District Realm, not only did it have many half-step eightfold ancestors in charge, but there were also many strong people who had left the Hanhai District Realm and could be summoned back at any time.

Therefore, they didn't dare to offend Hanhai Palace!

In the end, the major forces still agreed to the quota request of Hanhai Palace.

Hanhai Palace asked for 50,000 places, and the rest of the places were allocated by other forces, while Xuanyu Pavilion only got more than 6,100 places.

Shortly thereafter, representatives of the major powers left.

......

Xuanyu Pavilion.

The upper echelons of the Xuanyu Pavilion released a message that any member, as long as they were in the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm, could use their points to purchase the opportunity to enter the No. 13 Ancient Nest.

That's right, it's just an opportunity, and you have to compete to get a spot.

Because there are only more than 3,000 places in total, there are actually more than 6,000 places, but some places are directly booked, and only 3,000 places will be given to other half-step sevenfold ancestors to compete for.

And how many half-step sevenfold ancestors does Xuanyu Pavilion have?

Ye Tian didn't know how many, the Xuanyu Pavilion of the Star Ancient Giant City was just a branch, and there were nearly tens of thousands of half-step sevenfold ancestors.

It is conceivable that the number of half-step sevenfold ancestors in the Xuanyu Pavilion is too many.

Only the number of Sevenfold Ancestors is relatively rare.

With so many half-step sevenfold ancestors, competing for only three thousand places, it can be described as fierce competition.

"Nest 13, what the hell is this?"

Ye Tian was a little curious, took a closer look, and after understanding it clearly, he knew the value of the No. 13 Ancient Nest.

There are a total of eighteen incomparably mysterious ancient nests in the Hanhai District, where they are, and the specific names, I don't know anything, only the number is used as the title.

Among them, no one knows where the No. 13 Ancient Nest is, but many half-step sevenfold ancestors in the entire Hanhai District Boundary can enter the No. 13 District Boundary through special methods at a certain time.

It is rumored that there are countless resources inside the No. 13 Ancient Nest, among which there are many treasures that can help the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor quickly refine his body.

It is even rumored that there is a reincarnation treasure inside the No. 13 Ancient Nest that allows people to reincarnate, as well as a supreme ancient treasure that allows Dao Ancestors to condense their clones.

After all, Dao Ancestor has no will clone, only a true body, if he has a clone, then the ability to save his life has increased greatly, which is equivalent to having a second life.

However, the Supreme Ancient Treasure that can make the Dao Ancestor condense the clone is too rare, and it cannot be found anywhere else at all, and the No. 13 Ancient Nest is said to have appeared.

In short, countless half-step sevenfold ancestors all wanted to enter the No. 13 Ancient Lair.

"I don't know much information, but there is no doubt that there are a lot of resources in the No. 13 Ancient Nest, although I am not short of resources at present, but if I want to quickly break the boundary, it is not enough to rely on the resources in my hands at all, if I enter the No. 13 Ancient Nest, maybe I will get incomparably precious treasures, so as to quickly improve the resources!"

Ye Tian decided to compete for a spot.
